description_long: This is a modern, two-seater sofa upholstered in a light blue fabric, featuring a plush and inviting appearance. The sofa has a straight, continuous backrest with two large, loose back cushions and three accent pillows in varying shades of blue and white. The armrests are padded and display a tufted pattern on the outer sides, adding a touch of elegance and texture. The seat is a single, wide cushion, providing a smooth and uniform sitting surface. The sofa stands on slender, metallic legs, with four positioned at the corners and one central support for added stability. The overall design is contemporary, with clean lines and a soft, matte finish suitable for both indoor and sheltered urban outdoor settings.
description: A modern light blue two-seater sofa with tufted armrests, loose back cushions, and slim metallic legs. It features accent pillows and a smooth, matte fabric finish.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full width, two large back cushions, three accent pillows, and the single seat cushion.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the tufted armrest, slim profile, and arrangement of cushions along the backrest.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the plain, continuous back panel and the tops of the back cushions.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirroring the tufted armrest and cushion arrangement, with metallic legs visible.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Two large, loose back cushions and one long, single seat cushion; three accent pillows in front, all cushions are uniform in size and unattached.
attribute_armrest_style: Present, padded, and straight with a medium height relative to the seat; outer sides feature a tufted pattern for decorative effect.
attribute_leg_design: Five slender, metallic legs: four at the corners and one central support; legs are straight, exposed, and have a polished metal finish.
attribute_backrest_type: Straight, medium-high continuous backrest with two large, loose cushions; no visible tufting or channeling on the backrest itself.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid light blue fabric with a smooth, matte texture; tufted pattern on the outer sides of the armrests, otherwise no visible decorative stitching or pattern.
